sentences.arabic: ضَاعَ عَلِيٌّ فِي المَدِينَةِ وَلَمْ يَعْرِفِ الطَّرِيقَ.
sentences.translation: Ali se izgubio u gradu i nije znao put.
sentences.translationEn: Ali got lost in the city and didn't know the way.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ شَخْصًا فِي الشَّارِعِ عَنِ المَحَطَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pitao je osobu na ulici za stanicu.
sentences.translationEn: He asked a person on the street about the station.

sentences.translation: Osoba mu je rekla neka ide desno.
sentences.translationEn: The person told him to walk to the right.

sentences.translation: Ali je zahvalio osobi i pošao.
sentences.translationEn: Ali thanked the person and walked away.
